reviews.review_description:
13 tasks
if you don't finish the program, the robot walks, if you finish it completely, the robot just stands still, music plays and nothing happens. When restarting, you have to start all over again. And so on three times. What to do?

About every 2nd time I open Program VR I have no controls, I think the beams are still there because it randomly hits things, but I can't see them.
I have done the usual power down restart. 

For those times where the controls are there, they stay on through the session. So it seems to be something to do with when it starts up.

The stages are well planned and the challenges help students learn the basic concepts of computer programming. Watching a PvP is always fun.  There's a glitch where the users arms may not show up and requires a few app Quit > Reload until the user location is accurate.

It does help with programming and understanding.  But when you're in the game and doing the commands or putting in code it would help if the game wouldn't glitch and take a line of code I specified know I put in.  Another level I had the right code and the robot died said sorry try again, didn't change one single thing and it cleared the level.  Before you make a game to teach coding you should probumake sure your code don't fail.

developer_response.body:
Hi,

We're sorry to hear about the issues you faced. This seems to be occurring only for a few users in certain levels. Please share more details about the levels by joining our Discord: https://bit.ly/ProgrammerVR_Support

Thank you for your understanding.

reviews.review_title: A great learning app for the kids!
reviews.review_description:
I came across this while browsing and thought of trying it out with my 11 year old niece. I wasn't very sure if she was going to enjoy it as it was about programming.

It was a pleasant surprise that she absolutely loved it. She could learn programming concepts like conditions and loop, all while really enjoying it.  

Not fair that I had to learn them the hard way!!

Definitely recommend it for all those looking to learn programming.

Great little app, very fun especially for kids that are into coding and such. 

My kids absolutely love it, keeps them engaged! They love the coop side of it! They take turns by one person shouting the instructions and the other entering the instruction to bob! 

They love the competitive side, of the leaderboard and how far they can get 🤩

Great app!!
I have played a lot of puzzle games, but this is unique. It was so much fun solving the puzzles by learning and applying programming concepts
Good game to get an idea on how to program. Definitely worth it!

developer_response.body:
Hi,

Join us on our Discord server for updates  - https://bit.ly/ProgrammerVR_Support

reviews.review_description: I just got this today and I really like it. It’s simple and cute and yet the puzzles lead to more and more complex programming. So far it’s an easy and fun drag and drop and I’m really looking forward to learning more. The robot and the environment are really cute, this is a great game!

I can’t get pass campain mode level 9 as it only has the option ”right” to chose when I need to turn left. It’s like the button for right is blocking the view of the button for left and therefore left can’t be chosen.

developer_response.body:
Hi, 

Apologies for the confusion created in campaign level 9. It's by design to have only option of Turn Right. In order to make Bob Turn left, you have to use Turn Right 3 times.

Update: We have added hint for this level in the new update today. For any further assistance, join Programmer VR Discord - https://bit.ly/ProgrammerVR_Support

reviews.review_description: I love the game so far. However the most recent levels as well as the daily challenge, after I hit play it doesn't do anything it just freezes use explain and there's no way to exit except to quit the game go out wait 24 hours go back in then it plays regularly except for the daily challenge that consistently freezes when I go in it and attempt to complete the level. So it would be excellent except I paid for a game that constantly freezes.

developer_response.body: Apologies that you encountered an issue. However, we haven't observed any such issue. To understand and address the issue you're facing, we invite you to join us on ProgrammerVR Discord (https://bit.ly/ProgrammerVR_Support) and share a screen recording of the specific issue. We'll look into it and assist you accordingly.

reviews.review_description:
Hi. i’m enjoying the game One thing  confusing me is the bridges. They seem to change after i load in the program. if a bridge is closed i set the instructions then when i hit go the bridge changes to open. if there are multiple bridges both change. I just keep hitting play till they happen to match my commands.  I can’t figure out how to know what they will do after hitting go.

I’m not sure if it was just one level or two. After playing more levels I haven’t had the issue again. 

👍

developer_response.body:
Hi,

Glad you are enjoying the game. When you hit the play button, the bridge states are randomized between open and close. We need to close the bridge when it is open. If it already closed, Bob can simply walk over the bridge.

We can solve the levels with bridges using a IF block without the need to match the instructions with the bridge state. The 16th Level in CLEVER is a tutorial level on how to use IF Block to solve the levels with bridges.

reviews.review_description: They're obsessed with solving puzzles in this app, and I am really fascinated by the way this game uses everyday things like traffic lights and bridges to teach concepts like loops and conditional statements. Happy that I randomly came across this game!😄
Supper boring

developer_response.body:
Hi Chris Johnson,

Thank you for sharing your feedback with us. We're sorry to hear that you found the game boring. We're continuously working to improve the experience and would love to hear more about what you'd like to see in the game.

Your insights are invaluable as we continue to develop and enhance the gameplay. If you have any specific suggestions, feel free to share them by joining our Discord: https://bit.ly/ProgrammerVR_Support

reviews.review_description: Game is fun, but I seem to notice that hand tracking isn't at best ability yet. I think if they can get it so you can touch buttons and drag tracking, it would be fun. Also, if im using hand tracking mode, you should be able to set the program console like you can with the track. That way I'm not spending time trying to grab my chair or couch trying to grab the program tile which causes me to lose experience points in the long haul.

developer_response.body:
Hi,

Thank you for your feedback! We're working to improve hand tracking and appreciate your input. We'd love to hear more about the feedback you've shared. Please join our Discord to discuss further: https://bit.ly/ProgrammerVR_Support

reviews.review_description: I’m really enjoying this game. I’m not necessarily IT savvy, but this has been a great introduction to programming. Just one thing, with the ‘if’ action, sometimes I’m unable to add whether the bridge is open or closed. Not sure what I’m doing wrong.

Great game to go over the basics of programming. Nothing like a visual to go with the concepts to really drive it home. The puzzles are fun and interesting. Great game for anyone that likes to code and wants to learn.  Easy to learn and step by step guide to get you started.

The game itself is okay, providing a valuable recollection of programming skills and fun. 

However, I found that my progress from yesterday was lost, and I now have to start from the day before.

developer_response.body:
Hi,

We're sorry to hear about the lost progress. Your game data is saved in the cloud and shouldn't be lost. Please reach out to us on Discord, and we will help you recover your progress. Discord Link: https://bit.ly/ProgrammerVR_Support

reviews.review_description:
Really fun, I’m looking to start playing with coding as a bit of a hobby and these seems like a perfect starting point. 

I was having an issue with one level and the devs were quick to support. 

Easy 5 stars.

developer_response.body: Hello, we are delighted that you are enjoying ProgrammerVR. We would like to understand the issue you are facing. Please do join ProgrammerVR Discord (https://bit.ly/ProgrammerVR_Support) and share us screenshots of the issue you are facing. We would be happy to assist you.

reviews.review_description: I tried this app for my 12 year old son, he enjoyed it as a game as well as learnt programming concepts like If, Loops. Liked the idea of the learning programming concepts with command blocks.
